creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Ugh.  This database server should become more unix friendly before 
it hits the ports tree.  Please ask the hypersonicsql people to 
merge your patches etc. then resubmit a port.  Sorry for getting 
back to you so late, but I'd think it's understandable given the 
ickiness of this server software's bootstrap tools.
